ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol number of the study */,
  "inclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Inclusion criteria for the study */,
  "exclusion_criteria" TEXT /* Exclusion criteria for the study */,
  "study_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "study_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, completed, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the site */,
  "site_principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the site principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the investigator is leading the study */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  "investigator_role" TEXT /* Role of the investigator (e.g., principal investigator, sub-investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the patient is enrolled in */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the patient is being treated */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investigator leading the study at the site */,
  "demographic_info" TEXT /* Demographic information of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being assessed */,
  "visit_day" INTEGER /* Day of the visit */,
  "tx_group" TEXT /* Treatment group assignment */,
  "lead_status" TEXT /* Lead status of the patient */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_time" TEXT /* Time of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_scores" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being scored */,
  "p1" INTEGER /* Score for positive symptom item 1 */,
  "p2" INTEGER /* Score for positive symptom item 2 */,
  "p3" INTEGER /* Score for positive symptom item 3 */,
  "p4" INTEGER /* Score for positive symptom item 4 */,
  "p5" INTEGER /* Score for positive symptom item 5 */,
  "p6" INTEGER /* Score for positive symptom item 6 */,
  "p7" INTEGER /* Score for positive symptom item 7 */,
  "n1" INTEGER /* Score for negative symptom item 1 */,
  "n2" INTEGER /* Score for negative symptom item 2 */,
  "n3" INTEGER /* Score for negative symptom item 3 */,
  "n4" INTEGER /* Score for negative symptom item 4 */,
  "n5" INTEGER /* Score for negative symptom item 5 */,
  "n6" INTEGER /* Score for negative symptom item 6 */,
  "n7" INTEGER /* Score for negative symptom item 7 */,
  "g1" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 1 */,
  "g2" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 2 */,
  "g3" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 3 */,
  "g4" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 4 */,
  "g5" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 5 */,
  "g6" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 6 */,
  "g7" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 7 */,
  "g8" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 8 */,
  "g9" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 9 */,
  "g10" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 10 */,
  "g11" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 11 */,
  "g12" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 12 */,
  "g13" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 13 */,
  "g14" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 14 */,
  "g15" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 15 */,
  "g16" INTEGER /* Score for general psychopathology item 16 */,
  "panss_total" INTEGER /* Total PANSS score */,
  "score_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the assessment scores */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investigator, research coordinator, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the assessment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_protocol" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "protocol_version")
)

CREATE TABLE "informed_consent" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "informed_consent_date" TEXT /* Date the informed consent was signed */,
  "informed_consent_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the patient or representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "adverse_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient experiencing the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adverse_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
